parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Revenus
  COALESCE(SUM(ap.monthly_price) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'active'), 0) AS revenu_mensuel,
  COALESCE(SUM(ap.setup_price_paid) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'active'), 0) AS revenu_setup_total,
  -- Compteurs
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.id) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'active') AS nb_actives,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.id) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'en_attente') AS nb_en_attente,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.id) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'suspendue') AS nb_suspendues,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.id) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'annulee') AS nb_annulees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.id) AS nb_total_achats,
  -- Clients
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.tenant_id) FILTER (WHERE ap.status = 'active') AS nb_clients_actifs,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ap.tenant_id) AS nb_clients_total,
  -- Catalogue
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM automation_catalog WHERE is_active = true) AS nb_catalogue,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthly_price), 0) FROM automation_catalog WHERE is_active = true) AS revenu_potentiel_mensuel,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(setup_price), 0) FROM automation_catalog WHERE is_active = true) AS revenu_potentiel_setup
FROM automation_purchases ap

SELECT
  ac.categorie,
  COUNT(ap.id) AS nb_actives,
  COALESCE(SUM(ap.monthly_price), 0) AS revenu_mensuel
FROM automation_purchases ap
JOIN automation_catalog ac ON ac.id = ap.automation_id
WHERE ap.status = 'active'
GROUP BY ac.categorie
ORDER BY revenu_mensuel DESC

SELECT
  ac.complexity,
  COUNT(ap.id) AS nb_actives,
  COALESCE(SUM(ap.monthly_price), 0) AS revenu_mensuel
FROM automation_purchases ap
JOIN automation_catalog ac ON ac.id = ap.automation_id
WHERE ap.status = 'active'
GROUP BY ac.complexity
ORDER BY ac.complexity

SELECT
  ac.nom,
  ac.code,
  ac.categorie,
  ac.complexity,
  ap.monthly_price,
  ap.setup_price_paid,
  t.nom_entreprise AS client_name
FROM automation_purchases ap
JOIN automation_catalog ac ON ac.id = ap.automation_id
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = ap.tenant_id
WHERE ap.status = 'active'
ORDER BY ap.monthly_price DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  t.id,
  t.nom_entreprise,
  COUNT(ap.id) AS nb_automations,
  COALESCE(SUM(ap.monthly_price), 0) AS revenu_mensuel
FROM automation_purchases ap
JOIN tenants t ON t.id = ap.tenant_id
WHERE ap.status = 'active'
GROUP BY t.id, t.nom_entreprise
ORDER BY revenu_mensuel DESC
LIMIT 10
